description_long: This is a freestanding vertical banner display with a rectangular metal frame supporting a printed fabric panel. The lower section of the banner features a black background with a colorful, swirling abstract design and the word 'seg' prominently displayed in white, accompanied by a logo. The upper section of the frame is open or filled with a translucent or white panel, providing a clear separation from the printed area below. The supporting structure consists of slim, metallic legs and crossbars, ensuring stability on flat surfaces. The overall design is modern and professional, suitable for promotional or informational use in public spaces. The materials and construction suggest it is lightweight and portable, intended for temporary or semi-permanent installation.
description: A modern freestanding vertical banner with a metal frame and a printed fabric panel featuring a logo and colorful abstract design. The structure is lightweight and stable, ideal for public or event use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full printed banner with the 'seg' logo and colorful abstract design on a black background.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the slim profile of the metal frame and the crossbar supports, with no visible printed content.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the same printed banner and frame structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin metal frame and support bars without any visible banner content.
